steps.title: Use the takeoff context
steps.content: The plane begins to gather speed just before Boston tilts away and the travelers ascend. In this context, gather describes the plane increasing speed as it accelerates for takeoff.

steps.title: Choose the acceleration meaning
steps.content: B means to be uncertain, which cannot describe what a plane does with speed. C means to receive gladly, which does not fit a physical action here. D means to compel, but force speed is not the natural phrase for increasing velocity. The remaining word means increase or acquire. The answer is A.
